name: Seasoned Oranges and Yogurt
recipeIngredient: Chopped pistachios or other nuts, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the plain yogurt in a cheesecloth-lined sieve and drain over a bowl in the refrigerator while you prepare the rest of your dinner. This will thicken the yogurt into a curd-like consistency.
2. Remove all skin and pith from the oranges and cut them into segments.
3. Season and sweeten the orange segments with honey and spices to taste.
4. Gently fold in some of the thickened yogurt, reserving some orange segments for garnish.
5. Dust the remaining orange segments and the dish with chopped pistachios or other nuts.
Yield: 2 servings
